resume.paragraph_1: Computer Science graduate from BINUS University with hands-on experience in IT project management, Agile/Scrum methodologies, and end-to-end product delivery. I lead cross-functional teams and stakeholder communication across 11+ client projects.
resume.paragraph_2: My focus is on crafting software architecture that is well-structured, maintainable, and aligned with business goals. I combine technical expertise with proactive communication and leadership to ensure every project delivers logical clarity and a meaningful real-world impact.

AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: A brief introduction to who I am.

resume.paragraph_1: I'm Luthfi Hadi, a Computer Science graduate from BINUS University with hands-on experience in IT project management, Agile/Scrum methodologies, and end-to-end product delivery. I have a proven track record leading cross-functional teams and managing stakeholder communication across 11+ client projects.
resume.paragraph_2: My primary focus is crafting software architecture that doesn't just work but is well-structured, maintainable, and scalable to meet business needs. I believe that high-quality code must go hand-in-hand with system efficiency and logical clarity.
resume.paragraph_3: I blend technical expertise with proactive communication, critical thinking, and effective time management. I thrive in collaborative environments and leverage leadership skills to ensure every project delivers optimal results and a real-world impact.
